pre_animation: variable.hand_bob = query.life_time < 0.01 ? 0.0 : variable.hand_bob + ((query.is_on_ground && query.is_alive ? math.clamp(math.sqrt(math.pow(query.position_delta(0), 2.0) + math.pow(query.position_delta(2), 2.0)), 0.0, 0.1) : 0.0) - variable.hand_bob) * 0.02;

variable.holding_power = query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='fire_ball' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='dh_crystal' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='dh_spike' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='sf_slime' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='wb_ray' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='wb_stomp' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='dt_clone' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='bv_lightning' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='bv_electrokinesis' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='arc_ice' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='clock_beam' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='clock_time' || query.get_equipped_item_name('main_hand') =='clock_stop';
